name: Zero FileMaker references in codebase
description: Verify comprehensive removal of all FileMaker references from source code

expectedOutputs.name: environment detection result
expectedOutputs.assertion: should return WEBAPP environment type and SUPABASE auth method when window.FileMaker is undefined

expectedOutputs.name: backend API response
expectedOutputs.assertion: should return data structure compatible with FileMaker response format when routing through backend

expectedOutputs.name: authentication state
expectedOutputs.assertion: should contain valid Supabase session with user ID and access token when using SUPABASE auth method

expectedOutputs.name: HMAC authorization header
expectedOutputs.assertion: should generate valid HMAC header in format 'Bearer {signature}.{timestamp}' for backend requests

expectedOutputs.name: data service routing decision
expectedOutputs.assertion: should route to backend API when environmentType is WEBAPP and useFileMaker flag is false

expectedOutputs.name: FileMaker integration removal status
expectedOutputs.assertion: should return no matches when grepping codebase for FileMaker references after removal

steps: Run grep -r 'FileMaker' src/ and verify zero matches
Run grep -r 'FMGofer' src/ and verify zero matches
Run grep -r 'fetchDataFromFileMaker' src/ and verify zero matches
Run grep -r 'ENVIRONMENT_TYPES.FILEMAKER' src/ and verify zero matches
expectedOutcome: Codebase contains zero references to FileMaker objects, functions, or constants
